mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, image_url, is_featured, brand, original_price, discount, limited_time_price, limited_time_start_at, limited_time_end_at, tag, images, specifications, detail_content, variants, warranty, shipping, status, created_at, updated_at FROM products

SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, image_url, is_featured, brand, original_price, discount, limited_time_price, limited_time_start_at, limited_time_end_at, tag, images, specifications, detail_content, variants, warranty, shipping, status, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, image_url, is_featured, brand, original_price, discount, limited_time_price, limited_time_start_at, limited_time_end_at, tag, images, specifications, detail_content, variants, warranty, shipping, status, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, category_id = #{categoryId}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, brand = #{brand}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, discount = #{discount}, limited_time_price = #{limitedTimePrice}, limited_time_start_at = #{limitedTimeStartAt}, limited_time_end_at = #{limitedTimeEndAt}, tag = #{tag}, images = #{images}, specifications = #{specifications}, detail_content = #{detailContent}, variants = #{variants}, warranty = #{warranty}, shipping = #{shipping}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
